name: Hot Crab Fondue
recipeIngredient: 1 can Crab, drained and flaked (8 1/2 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, melt the cheese until smooth.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the melted cheese and stir well.
3. If the mixture thickens, add more wine. It should make about 2 1/2 cups.
